related_country_risk_title: Succession and political transition risks amid erosion of democratic institutions

related_country_risk_title: Refugee hosting pressures amid recurrent droughts and limited resources

The influx of migrants and displaced persons places substantial demands on Djibouti's public services and local communities.

related_country_risk_title: Terrorism and regional conflict exposure linked to al-Shabaab and external deployments

related_country_risk_title: Succession and political transition risks amid erosion of democratic institutions

related_country_risk_title: Refugee hosting pressures amid recurrent droughts and limited resources

related_country_risk_title: Escalating sectarian violence in Djibouti City threatens social cohesion

evidence_quote: The participatory development approach is expected to strengthen resilience and social cohesion in the target areas. related_country_risk_title: Succession and political transition risks amid erosion of democratic institutions

related_country_risk_title: Succession and political transition risks amid erosion of democratic institutions
susceptibility_summary: The project’s core governance and decision-making relies on sustained engagement of high-level political leadership (ministers, central bank governor) and inter-agency coordination structures; any disruption in political continuity/transition could slow approvals (workplans/budgets), coordination, and implementation oversight.
evidence_quote: A high-level Steering Committee for the project will be established no later than one month after effectiveness. It will be chaired by the Minister of Economy and Finance with the Minister of Urban and Housing Development (MVUH), and will include the Minister of Budget, the Governor of the Central Bank and the President of the Chamber of Commerce. It will oversee the project, approve work programs and annual budgets, review annual reports, and will meet at least twice a year to review project implementation progress.

related_country_risk_title: April 2026 elections may compound fragility amid domestic instability and spillover concerns

evidence_quote: Political and governance risk is rated substantial. The governance of the FGPCD will have to evolve to include the Ministry of Housing and specific steering committees for the housing and SME business. ARULoS will have to play a role of enabler in this project, mobilizing the private sector to provide financing for affordable housing, which is a different role than they play today as a provider of affordable housing supply. The success of the project will rest on a strong coordination between ARULoS, FGPCD, Chamber of Commerce, and financial institutions, each contributing their expertise to a common goal.

related_country_risk_title: Succession and political transition risks amid erosion of democratic institutions

related_country_risk_title: Refugee hosting pressures amid recurrent droughts and limited resources

related_country_risk_title: Refugee hosting pressures amid recurrent droughts and limited resources

evidence_quote: Djibouti hosts about 35,000 internally displaced people, including over 23,000 refugees and 11,000 asylum seekers. It has seen an increased influx of refugees and migrants of almost 8 percent since January 2021.

related_country_risk_title: Escalating sectarian violence in Djibouti City threatens social cohesion

related_country_risk_title: Political constraints on civil society may limit broader governance and stabilization engagement

During this first round of meetings, the priority areas of the project were discussed without, however, consulting the local governments or communities, who will also be affected by or benefit from the project.

related_country_risk_title: April 2026 elections may compound fragility amid domestic instability and spillover concerns

evidence_quote: An in-depth empirical analysis of the effect of the 2007-2008 global financial and food crisis on fourteen African countries shows that soaring global commodity prices substantially affected the poor, triggering protests in developing countries and challenging policymakers to simultaneously address hunger, poverty and political instability18 . These protests, also known as food riots, are more likely to occur in countries that are neighbours of unstable political environments19 .

related_country_risk_title: April 2026 elections may compound fragility amid domestic instability and spillover concerns

Project activities that require close collaboration with Ethiopia will not be undertaken and respective disbursements will not be made unless the customs authorities of both countries have entered into a mutual understanding in a satisfactory manner to the World Bank, sufficient for Djibouti to be able to implement the activities.”

related_country_risk_title: Terrorism and regional conflict exposure linked to al-Shabaab and external deployments

related_country_risk_title: Refugee hosting pressures amid recurrent droughts and limited resources

related_country_risk_title: Insurgent activity by FRUD-armé threatens security forces and territorial stability

related_country_risk_title: Constitutional revision enabling extended incumbency heightens political tensions

related_country_risk_title: Refugee hosting pressures amid recurrent droughts and limited resources

evidence_quote: Favoriser l’inclusion des réfugiés dans le système éducatif national, y compris dans les écoles administrées par le MENFOP dans les camps de réfugiés anciennement gérés par des ONG ou le HCR.

related_country_risk_title: Escalating sectarian violence in Djibouti City threatens social cohesion

related_country_risk_title: April 2026 elections may compound fragility amid domestic instability and spillover concerns
susceptibility_summary: Le modèle de financement basé sur les résultats dépend de décisions administratives formelles (notes de service signées) du MENFOP pour déclencher la mise en œuvre et les décaissements, ce qui est opérationnellement vulnérable à des retards/interruptions de gouvernance en période d’instabilité politique.

related_country_risk_title: Political constraints on civil society may limit broader governance and stabilization engagement
susceptibility_summary: La conception met fortement l’accent sur l’engagement citoyen, des consultations régulières et un mécanisme de règlement des griefs, notamment avec parents, communautés et représentants locaux. evidence_quote: Le PMPP prévoit que les principales parties prenantes, et notamment les parents, les enseignants, les membres de la communauté, le personnel administratif des écoles, les membres d’autres ministères et les représentants locaux, soient régulièrement consultées, afin de les informer des activités du projet et des risques sociaux et environnementaux encourus.

related_country_risk_title: Constrained democratic space and repression of opposition and media increase unrest risk

evidence_quote: Le système de S&E détaillera les rôles et responsabilités en matière de collecte et d’accès aux données afin de garantir la production régulière et en temps opportun des rapports, y compris les autorisations ou approbations requises pour mener des enquêtes ou des visites sur le terrain.

related_country_risk_title: Insurgent activity by FRUD-armé threatens security forces and territorial stability

related_country_risk_title: Succession and political transition risks amid erosion of democratic institutions

related_country_risk_title: Refugee hosting pressures amid recurrent droughts and limited resources

evidence_quote: “Officially, Djibouti hosts close to 30,000 refugees and asylum seekers from Somalia, Ethiopia, Eritrea, and Yemen, the equivalent of 3 percent of its population, mainly in three camps outside the capital city of the country (Ali-Addeh, Hol-Hol and Merkazi). related_country_risk_title: Constrained democratic space and repression of opposition and media increase unrest risk

related_country_risk_title: Succession and political transition risks amid erosion of democratic institutions

related_country_risk_title: Constitutional revision enabling extended incumbency heightens political tensions

evidence_quote: In past projects, the project steering committee was not sufficiently empowered to resolve significant issues and would often defer to Ministers, which led to delays in making key decisions.

related_country_risk_title: Refugee hosting pressures amid recurrent droughts and limited resources
susceptibility_summary: Project planning tools (including definition of rights-holders for land tenure) explicitly risk excluding non-citizens, immigrants, and refugees living in slums—creating a direct vulnerability in beneficiary reach/targeting under displacement pressures.
evidence_quote: « Les outils de planification et de gestion du programme pourraient entraîner l'exclusion des plus pauvres, qui ont normalement les plus petites parcelles, et des non-Djiboutiens, des immigrants et des réfugiés vivant dans des bidonvilles. »

related_country_risk_title: Escalating sectarian violence in Djibouti City threatens social cohesion
susceptibility_summary: The project’s community-facing investments and participatory approaches could face disruption in environments where social tensions rise, as the PAD explicitly links exclusion/limited inclusion and displacement pressures to potential social tensions and the need to strengthen social cohesion between displaced/refugees and host communities.
evidence_quote: Ce manque d'inclusion peut exacerber les inégalités économiques et éventuellement générer des tensions sociales.

related_country_risk_title: Succession and political transition risks amid erosion of democratic institutions
susceptibility_summary: Implementation depends on high-level inter-ministerial coordination and a Steering Committee explicitly intended to resolve bottlenecks; governance disruption in a fragile political environment could therefore affect decision-making and unblock implementation issues.
evidence_quote: Compte tenu de la nécessité d'une coordination forte entre les ministères et les entités publiques, un Comité de Pilotage du Projet (CPP) sera mis en place [...] pour [...] appui à la mise en œuvre du projet, notamment en intervenant pour résoudre les blocages.

related_country_risk_title: Political constraints on civil society may limit broader governance and stabilization engagement
susceptibility_summary: The project’s community-driven microprojects and public space management rely on local civil society associations, but the PAD notes civil society is very weak and lacks a clear regulatory framework—creating susceptibility to disruption or limited execution capacity for these participatory activities.
evidence_quote: La société civile est également très faible, sans réglementation claire régissant ni son fonctionnement et ni sa bonne coordination (interne et avec d'autres acteurs).

related_country_risk_title: April 2026 elections may compound fragility amid domestic instability and spillover concerns
susceptibility_summary: Key elements of the resettlement and site connectivity are to be financed by the Government rather than the project, creating susceptibility if public financing is delayed or disrupted during periods of heightened political fragility.
evidence_quote: Les infrastructures hors site pour relier la zone de relogement seront financées par le gouvernement [...] Le reste des besoins financiers pour le relogement sera fourni par le gouvernement, potentiellement à travers les autres programmes de logement.

related_country_risk_title: Constitutional revision enabling extended incumbency heightens political tensions
susceptibility_summary: The PAD flags weaknesses in public financial management practices and limited external audit assurance for the implementing agency, which can heighten implementation and fiduciary vulnerability in a context of governance-related fragility.
evidence_quote: certaines pratiques affectent l'efficacité de la réglementation. C'est notamment le cas pour : (i) le recours aux procédures dérogatoires pour les dépenses publiques ; et (ii) un manque de discipline budgétaire et de contrôle budgétaire.
